docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,000.15 FILED BY MUTUNGI, VICTOR S. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CELLSPACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CELLSPACE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUTUNGI, VICTOR S. $3,344.95 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,424.95, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CONFORM TO PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUTUNGI, VICTOR S.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CELLSPACE AS TO DEFENDANT MUTUNGI, VICTOR S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ZOE GARVIN, CELLSPACE 2050 BRYANT ST,SF,CA 94110

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MUTUNGI, VICTOR S. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT CELLSPACE $2,260.50 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,335.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR ONE-HALF THE REVENUE FROM BAR SALES, AND ONE-HALF OF BAR EXPENSES PAID BY DEFENDANT MUTUNGI. TO THE EXTENT PLAINTIFF CELLSPACE PREVIOUSLY HAS PAID DEFENDANT FOR HIS SHARE OF BAR SALES, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR SUCH PAYMENT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF CELLSPACE
POS ON SUBPOENA DUCES-TECUM AS FOR: ZOE GARVIN, CELLSPACE, FILED.
